meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Use Antigravity Templates to Solve SaaS Gaps
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with SaaS architecture. Learn how the Antigravity project template and Claude Code help you ship professional SaaS apps in record time.
content.answer_block: If you lack deep SaaS knowledge, the Antigravity project template acts as your architectural blueprint. By pairing it with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate setup and backend logic. This combination allows you to ship production-ready SaaS features for clients without needing a senior-level engineering background or months of learning.
content.intro:
The client meeting went well, but the silence after they asked for a custom SaaS dashboard is deafening. You are a freelancer, not a backend architect, and the mountain of boilerplate code—authentication, database schemas, and API routes—feels like an insurmountable wall. The pressure to ship fast is real, but the fear of technical debt is paralyzing.

There is a better way. Instead of reinventing the wheel, we use the Antigravity project template to provide the structural skeleton of a modern, scalable SaaS. When paired with the raw intelligence of Claude Code, you transform from a solo freelancer into a rapid-deployment agency, shipping robust products while others are still setting up their environment.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Base
steps.description: Standardize your project foundation to ensure security and scalability from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity production-ready boilerplate with Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Configure Database Schema
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your client requirements to a relational database model.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Supabase SQL migration script for a SaaS user management system including workspaces, team roles, and subscription status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate migration file for workspace and subscription tables'

steps.title: Implement Auth Middleware
steps.description: Secure your routes automatically using the built-in Antigravity security patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement middleware to protect /dashboard routes and redirect unauthorized users to the login page.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Setup Next.js middleware with Supabase auth for protected routes'

steps.title: Build Dynamic UI Components
steps.description: Use Antigravity components to rapidly prototype client-facing dashboards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive sidebar navigation component that adapts based on user role and team workspace.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate Sidebar component with role-based access control'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Automate the CI/CD pipeline to move from local development to a live URL.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Vercel deployment settings and environment variable mapping for the Antigravity template.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure Vercel build settings for production deployment'

pro_tips: Always keep your Supabase types synced; use Claude Code to re-run type generation whenever you modify your database schema.
Leverage the Antigravity 'service-layer' pattern to keep business logic out of your UI components for easier maintenance.
Use mock data factories during development to test edge cases without needing to manually populate your database.
Implement 'Feature Flags' early using environment variables to allow clients to toggle features without needing code redeploys.
Audit your bundle size weekly; the Antigravity template is lightweight, but third-party dependencies can quickly bloat your production build.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, focus on integrating a payment provider like Stripe using the Antigravity webhooks module to finalize your SaaS monetization strategy.
content.conversion_block: Stop guessing your architecture and start shipping high-value SaaS products that your clients will love. Master the tools that turn hours of coding into minutes of configuration. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
